divisions.title: Paul's Ministry
divisions.summary: Paul defends his ministry, explains suffering and comfort, calls for reconciliation, and describes the glory of the new covenant

divisions.title: Generous Giving
divisions.summary: The example of Macedonian churches, principles of generous and cheerful giving for the Jerusalem collection

divisions.title: Paul's Defense
divisions.summary: Paul defends his apostleship against false teachers, boasts in weakness, describes visions and hardships, final warnings

chapterSummaries.1: Paul's greeting, comfort in affliction, why he changed travel plans
chapterSummaries.2: Restoring the repentant sinner, triumph in Christ, aroma of life
chapterSummaries.3: Ministers of the new covenant, glory that exceeds the old
chapterSummaries.4: Treasure in jars of clay, light from darkness, eternal weight of glory
chapterSummaries.5: Earthly tent and heavenly dwelling, ministry of reconciliation
chapterSummaries.6: Working together with God, hardships of ministry, do not be unequally yoked
chapterSummaries.7: Paul's joy at their repentance, godly sorrow leads to salvation
chapterSummaries.8: The grace of giving, the example of Macedonian churches, Christ became poor
chapterSummaries.9: Sowing and reaping, God loves a cheerful giver, thanksgiving to God
chapterSummaries.10: Paul defends his authority, weapons of warfare, boasting in the Lord
chapterSummaries.11: Concern for the Corinthians, Paul's sufferings as an apostle
chapterSummaries.12: Visions and revelations, thorn in the flesh, strength in weakness
chapterSummaries.13: Final warnings, examine yourselves, greetings and benediction
